name: @rozie-ui/headless-core
comment:source-only: Phase 64 (D-01): a SOURCE-ONLY package. NO codegen, NO compiled per-framework leaves. It carries shared `.rzts` script-partials (windowing.rzts P1, listCore.rzts P2) that DISSOLVE into each consumer's compiled leaf via inlineScriptPartials() before IR lowering — leaving ZERO runtime dependency on this package. Consumers add it as a `devDependency` and import via BARE specifier (e.g. `import { windowedRows } from '@rozie-ui/headless-core/windowing.rzts'`).
comment:exports: The `.rzts` subpaths are declared via the literal-extension `exports` shape (mirror @rozie-ui/listbox's `./Listbox.rozie` map) so ProducerResolver (enhanced-resolve, exportsFields:['exports'], `.rzts` ahead of `.ts`) resolves a cross-package bare specifier. windowing.rzts + listCore.rzts are declared NOW (before their files exist) so P1/P2 only ADD source files, never edit this manifest. The smoke.rzts probe is the P0 boundary-proof partial.

scripts.build: echo 'source-only: no codegen, no compiled leaves (.rzts dissolve at consumer compile)'
scripts.typecheck: echo 'source-only .rzts partials; consumers typecheck the inlined output'
